response:
Sec. 1  
peanuts are a type of food that contains proteins which can trigger allergic reactions in some individuals  
allergic reactions can cause symptoms such as hives or difficulty breathing  
these reactions are typically triggered by exposure to peanuts in the form of food or in the environment  
people who are allergic to peanuts cannot consume peanuts or any product that contains peanuts  
this makes it difficult for them to live underwater where peanuts may be present in the environment  

Sec. 2  
the lack of peanuts in the underwater environment means that there is no direct exposure to the allergen  
this reduces the risk of allergic reactions in individuals who are allergic to peanuts  
however the underwater environment may still contain other allergens that could trigger reactions  
this makes it possible for people who are allergic to peanuts to live underwater without experiencing severe allergic reactions
